name: code-reviewer
description: Lightweight code review assistant — checks style, potential bugs, and best practices
author: Kimi Plugin Community

interface.shortDescription: Lightweight code review assistant — checks style, potential bugs, and best practices
interface.longDescription:
Code Reviewer helps you catch common issues before submitting your pull requests.

Features:
- Scans for common bug patterns and anti-patterns
- Suggests style improvements aligned with project conventions
- Reviews commit-level changes and provides actionable feedback
- Loads review guidelines automatically at session start

Simply ask Kimi to "review the current change" or "check for issues" and the plugin will guide the review.

skillInstructions: When reviewing code, focus on: correctness first, then readability, then performance. Always explain the *why* behind each suggestion, not just the what.
